name: dayonebuilder-resolver
description: MCP adapter contract for agents that need to choose the best existing executor before building from scratch.

tools.name: dob_recommend_executor
tools.description: Given a task, return the best source URL, first action, smoke test, proof signal, and fallback.

tools.name: dob_repo_report
tools.description: Given a GitHub owner/repo, return public GitHub signals and an agent action plan.

tools.name: dob_record_event
tools.description: Record a resolver adoption event such as mcp_recommend_call, install_snippet_copy, outbound_repo_click, or smoke_test_pass.

trust_rules: Use GitHub public API or authenticated cache as source of truth.
Do not invent route, click, copy, install, or smoke-test counters.
Prefer the best external executor when it beats a DayOneBuilder-owned option.
